cases.title: Scenario-matrix coverage for DepartmentAdmin faculty scope across protected routes
preconditions: Testing-plan §7.3 security and authorization tests and AC-23 security/scope gate apply.
Role-matrix fixture provides DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X and AcademicAdmin with institution scope.
Attendance data, class sections, and sessions exist in faculty X and faculty Y.
steps: As DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X, call GET /v1/reports/attendance with termId and default pagination.
Call GET /v1/class-sections?termId={termId} and inspect returned section facultyId values.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionIdInFacultyX}/attendance for a session within faculty X.
Attempt GET /v1/reports/attendance with classSectionId from faculty Y.
Attempt PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionIdInFacultyY}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Excused and reason.
cases.expected: Maps to AC-23 role-based scope gate: DepartmentAdmin read and limited write succeed only within assigned faculty X per PRM-02; faculty Y report, roster, and correction requests are denied without partial data leakage (BR-19).

cases.title: M01 scope guard enforces facultyId boundary for DepartmentAdmin actions in DB transaction
preconditions: Integration database seeded with class sections in faculty X and faculty Y.
M01 Identity and Access module authorize(action, resource, scopeContext) uses real repository lookups.
DepartmentAdmin actor has facultyId claim for faculty X only.
Closed session in faculty X has enrolled student with AttendanceRecord status Absent; lecturer edit window expired.
steps: Invoke M01 authorize for DepartmentAdmin with AttendanceRecord.update targeting section in faculty X.
Invoke M05 correctAttendance as DepartmentAdmin for faculty X session with status Excused, reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs for the correction.
Invoke M01 authorize for DepartmentAdmin targeting classSectionId in faculty Y and observe denial.
Attempt M05 correctAttendance for faculty Y session and confirm no DB mutation.
cases.expected: M01 module boundary permits DepartmentAdmin update only when target section maps to assigned facultyId; faculty X correction commits with audit row per BR-16; faculty Y authorization fails at scope guard with no attendance or audit rows written.

cases.title: HTTP contract for DepartmentAdmin POST /v1/auth/login then GET /v1/me returns faculty scope claims
preconditions: Provisioned DepartmentAdmin account scoped to faculty X with institution-issued credentials exists.
No active bearer token is held by the test client.
steps: Send POST /v1/auth/login with DepartmentAdmin email and password.
Assert HTTP 200 with data.accessToken, data.expiresInSeconds, and data.roles containing DepartmentAdmin.
Send GET /v1/me with Authorization Bearer accessToken from login response.
Assert HTTP 200 with actor identity, DepartmentAdmin role, and facultyId scope claim for faculty X.
Verify response envelope matches standard { data, meta, error } shape with error null.
cases.expected: Login returns HTTP 200 with accessToken and DepartmentAdmin role per FR-36; GET /v1/me returns HTTP 200 with facultyId scope claims required for PRM-02 enforcement per FR-31 and API §4.1.

cases.title: HTTP contract for DepartmentAdmin GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance live roster within faculty scope
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Open class session in faculty X section has mixed Present, Late, Pending, and rejected attempt outcomes.
sessionId for faculty X session is known.
steps: Send GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with DepartmentAdmin Authorization header.
Validate HTTP 200 and standard response envelope.
Assert data.classSessionId, data.state, data.counts (present, late, pending, rejectedAttempts), and data.rows[] are present.
Inspect each roster row for studentCode, attendanceStatus, checkInMethod, checkInAt, and latestAttemptOutcome per API §4.5.
Send GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionIdFacultyY}/attendance for faculty Y session and validate denial.
cases.expected: Faculty X roster returns HTTP 200 with documented live roster payload shape per FR-19; faculty Y roster request returns HTTP 403 OutOfScope with no partial roster rows disclosed.

cases.title: HTTP contract for DepartmentAdmin POST /v1/enrollments/import with row-level rejection within faculty scope
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated with enrollment import permission enabled by policy.
Class section in faculty X exists with known classSectionId.
Import payload contains valid student rows and at least one invalid row (duplicate or malformed identifier).
steps: Send POST /v1/enrollments/import for faculty X classSectionId with mixed valid and invalid rows.
Assert HTTP 200 or 207 with per-row acceptance and rejection details in response envelope.
Verify rejected rows are not enrolled and valid rows are persisted.
Send POST /v1/enrollments/import targeting classSectionId in faculty Y.
Validate HTTP 403 OutOfScope with no enrollment mutations for faculty Y.
cases.expected: Faculty X import returns row-level rejection assertions for invalid rows per FR-04; valid rows persist; faculty Y import is denied before row processing with no cross-faculty enrollment writes.

cases.title: Primary department admin workflow: view faculty report and correct attendance exception
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Closed session in faculty X section has student with Absent status after close-time finalization.
Lecturer manual-edit window has expired; institution policy permits DepartmentAdmin correction per BR-16.
Attendance report data exists across faculty X and faculty Y.
steps: Call GET /v1/reports/attendance?termId={termId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as DepartmentAdmin.
Verify returned rows belong only to faculty X sections.
Identify Absent student in faculty X section from report results.
Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Excused, documented reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by actor and target for the correction event.
cases.expected: End-to-end department admin happy path per workflow §7: faculty-scoped report returns only faculty X rows; attendance correction succeeds within scope after lecturer window expiry; audit entry records DepartmentAdmin actor, reason, old/new status per BR-16.

cases.title: Alternate path: DepartmentAdmin CSV export scoped to assigned faculty via WF-07
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Attendance records exist in faculty X and faculty Y sections for the same term.
Export permission is enabled for DepartmentAdmin per policy.
steps: Call POST /v1/exports/attendance with format csv and filters { termId, status: Absent } as DepartmentAdmin.
Assert HTTP 202 with exportJobId and status Queued or Completed per API §4.6.
Download or poll export artifact and inspect CSV rows for classSectionId and faculty scope.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for export execution event.
Attempt POST /v1/exports/attendance with classSectionId filter targeting faculty Y.
cases.expected: DepartmentAdmin export succeeds with CSV rows limited to faculty X sections per BR-18; export audit entry records actor, scope filter, and format; faculty Y export filter is denied with HTTP 403 OutOfScope.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin report pagination invariants respect faculty scope at module boundary
preconditions: Integration database seeded with more than 50 attendance report rows in faculty X and additional rows in faculty Y.
M07 report query supports page and pageSize with DepartmentAdmin facultyId scope filter.
steps: Query page 1 with pageSize=25 as DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X and record totalItems, totalPages, and row identifiers.
Query page 2 with same filters and pageSize=25.
Query last page using totalPages from first response.
Verify no row identifiers from faculty Y appear on any page.
Confirm union of all pages equals totalItems and totalItems excludes faculty Y volume.
cases.expected: Pagination metadata is consistent within faculty X scope only: totalItems reflects faculty-scoped count; pages are non-overlapping; no faculty Y rows appear in any page.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin denied report and roster access for other faculty data
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Attendance data and open session roster exist in faculty Y section outside department scope.
steps: Call GET /v1/reports/attendance?classSectionId={facultyYSectionId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as DepartmentAdmin.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{facultyYSessionId}/attendance as DepartmentAdmin.
Inspect HTTP status, error.code, and response body for restricted data leakage.
Verify response contains no faculty Y student identifiers, attendance statuses, or scoped pagination totals.
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 OutOfScope or Forbidden; data is null; no partial faculty Y attendance rows, student identifiers, or cross-scope totals are disclosed per PRM-02 and BR-19.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin denied session control and institution-wide policy mutations
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Scheduled session exists in faculty X section.
AttendancePolicy record exists at institution scope.
steps: Call POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open as DepartmentAdmin.
Call POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close as DepartmentAdmin.
Call PATCH /v1/policies/{policyId} with modified GPS radius as DepartmentAdmin.
Call POST /v1/terms with new term payload as DepartmentAdmin.
Inspect each response for HTTP 403 Forbidden and absence of state mutations.
cases.expected: DepartmentAdmin receives HTTP 403 Forbidden for SessionControl.execute and AttendancePolicy.update per permission matrix §3.2; session state remains Scheduled; policy and term records are unchanged.

cases.title: Out-of-faculty classSectionId filter rejected before report query executes
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Attendance data exists in faculty Y section outside department scope.
steps: Submit GET /v1/reports/attendance with classSectionId targeting faculty Y.
Parse 403 response and any error.details field.
Verify no attendance rows from faculty Y appear in data or pagination metadata.
Retry with facultyId query parameter outside assigned scope if supported and observe same denial.
cases.expected: Scope validation short-circuits with HTTP 403 OutOfScope before unrestricted query; error.details contain no faculty Y attendance samples, student identifiers, or row counts per API §6.2.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin attendance correction rejected without documented reason when policy mandates
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Closed session in faculty X has student with Absent status.
Effective policy requires reason field for admin corrections per BR-16.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Excused and empty or missing reason.
Validate HTTP 400 or 422 with error.code indicating validation failure.
Query AttendanceRecord and confirm status remains Absent.
Retry with documented reason and confirm correction succeeds.
cases.expected: Missing reason returns HTTP 400 with validation error and no AttendanceRecord mutation; correction with reason succeeds within faculty scope per department policy exception handling.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin browser journey views PG-13 attendance report auto-scoped to assigned faculty
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin is logged in on desktop browser.
PG-13 /reports/attendance is reachable with TableToolbar and DataTable components.
Attendance data exists in faculty X (assigned) and faculty Y (out of scope) for the active term.
steps: Navigate to /reports/attendance and confirm section and course filter options list only faculty X offerings.
Apply term and status filters; verify table updates with faculty X rows only.
Enter student name or code in search field and confirm filtered results remain within faculty scope.
Navigate to page 2 via pagination controls if totalPages > 1.
Verify URL query params sync with toolbar state and no faculty Y section identifiers appear in filter dropdowns or table rows.
cases.expected: PG-13 listing auto-scopes DepartmentAdmin filters to assigned faculty per §14-listing-pages; displayed rows and filter options exclude faculty Y data; AttendanceStatusCell badges render for scoped rows only.

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin browser journey lists PG-09 class sections within faculty scope with read-only policy controls
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin is logged in on desktop browser.
PG-09 /admin/class-sections is reachable.
Class sections exist in faculty X and faculty Y for the active term.
steps: Navigate to /admin/class-sections and verify table lists only faculty X sections.
Apply term and course filters; confirm results remain within faculty X.
Open a faculty X section detail view and confirm read access to enrollment and session metadata.
Verify institution-wide policy write controls on PG-12 are hidden or read-only for DepartmentAdmin per NFR-UI-03.
Attempt direct URL navigation to a faculty Y section detail and observe access-denied state.
cases.expected: PG-09 listing shows faculty-scoped sections only; filters and pagination respect department boundary; policy configuration pages show read-only or hidden write controls; faculty Y direct navigation shows access denial without partial section data.
